class TaskQueue:
    def __init__(self):
        self._tasks = []

    def add(self, task):
        self._tasks.append(task)

    def remove(self, task_id):
        self._tasks = [t for t in self._tasks if t.id != task_id]

    def get_all(self):
        return list(self._tasks)

    def pop(self):
        return self._tasks.pop(0) if self._tasks else None

class WorkerPool:
    def __init__(self, num_workers=4):
        self._workers = []
        self._running = False
        self._num_workers = num_workers

    def start(self, task_queue):
        self._running = True
        for _ in range(self._num_workers):
            worker = threading.Thread(target=self._run_worker, args=(task_queue,), daemon=True)
            worker.start()
            self._workers.append(worker)

    def stop(self):
        self._running = False
        for worker in self._workers:
            worker.join(timeout=5)
        self._workers.clear()

    def _run_worker(self, task_queue):
        while self._running:
            task = task_queue.pop()
            if task:
                task.execute()
            else:
                time.sleep(0.1)
